raw_user_phrasing: type in any players name or a team and get all that stuff in one report; transfermarkt value + fifa rating 76 and 86 potential + season stats from ESPN
auth_scoping: all sources free; potential + espn are best-effort enrichment

notes.transfermarkt: PRIMARY identity+value spine. Community API transfermarkt-api (self-hostable, felipeall/transfermarkt-api). Main site Cloudflare-walled; wrapper is clean JSON. Confirmed marketValue 30000000 for Schjelderup id 670103.
notes.ea-fc: drop-api.ea.com direct JSON. overall rating + per-attribute stats. NO potential.
notes.sofifa-fifacm-potential: browser_clearance_http (Cloudflare). Best-effort potential only. Degrades to null when clearance stale.
notes.espn: site.api.espn.com JSON. Best-effort season/match stats; soccer player coverage thin.
